title: Dynamic subcolumns of materialized column cannot be found in ALTER UPDATE/DELETE queries
description:
```sql
:) create table test (s String, json JSON materialized s) engine=MergeTree order by tuple();
Ok.
:) alter table test update s = '' where json.s = '';
Received exception:
Code: 47. DB::Exception: Missing columns: 'json.s' while processing: '_CAST(if(json.s = '', _CAST('', 'String'), s), 'String'), s', required columns: 'json.s' 's', maybe you meant: 'json' or 's'. (UNKNOWN_IDENTIFIER)
:) delete from test where json.s = '';
Received exception:
Code: 47. DB::Exception: Missing columns: 'json.s' while processing: '_CAST(if(json.s = '', _CAST(0, 'UInt8'), _row_exists), 'UInt8'), _row_exists', required columns: 'json.s' '_row_exists', maybe you meant: 'json'. (UNKNOWN_IDENTIFIER)
```
These queries should work.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (s VARCHAR(255), json VARCHAR(255), id INT) PRIMARY KEY (id);
UPDATE test SET s = 'updated' WHERE s = 'example';
SELECT * FROM test WHERE json IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Dynamic subcolumns of materialized column in queries
